bfs_rules.evidence: gameplay-quality-report: all BFS-* cases pass (13/13 incl. portal zero-turn). _findPath state=(r,c,dir,turns), max 2 turns, 1-cell border corridor.

special_tiles.evidence: SpecialTiles.js: BOMB=6, WINDMILL=7, LANTERN=8, WAVE=9. All 4 types implemented with correct area effects.

level_goals.evidence: clear_all is the default win condition (TileGrid.isCleared). obstacle_clear partially implemented in ObstacleSystem.isObstacleGoalMet. No explicit LevelGoal class; tile_target and score_target not implemented as discrete goal types.
level_goals.gap: Missing formal LevelGoal dispatcher; tile_target and score_target not implemented

iap_flow.evidence: ShopScene.js: 3 IAP packs (60/420/1000石). ApiClient.js: submitIAP + addGlowstone. Browser fallback: direct addGlowstone(60) when not native platform.

exchange_ui.evidence: ShopScene._exchangeCoins: 50/150/500 coin packs costing 10/25/80 glowstone respectively. Exchange UI rendered in ShopScene.draw().

board_shapes.evidence: layouts.js: 6 chapters × 3 variants = 18 layouts. Each chapter has distinct non-rectangular shape: harbor_boat(6x6), pottery_vase(7x7), flower_fan(8x8), forest_leaf(8x8), hotspring_lantern(9x9), lighthouse_tower(10x10).

random_layout.evidence: layouts.js: pickLayout(pool) randomly selects from layoutPool per level. TileGrid._init() calls pickLayout. Level data configures layoutPool per tier.

chapter_bgm.evidence: audio-manifest.js: bgm_chapter1_seaside, bgm_chapter2_pottery, bgm_chapter3_flower, bgm_chapter4_forest, bgm_chapter5_hotspring, bgm_chapter6_lighthouse — all 6 present.

zen_bgm.evidence: audio-manifest.js: bgm_zen_ambient. ZenGameplayScene.js: this._audio?.playBGM?.("bgm_zen_ambient") in init().

portrait_lock.evidence: AndroidManifest.xml: android:screenOrientation="portrait". iOS: capacitor.config.json + Info.plist managed by Capacitor. iOS: Info.plist fixed — UIInterfaceOrientationLandscape{Left,Right} removed, ~ipad key removed. Confirmed portrait-only on iPhone 17 Pro simulator.

apk_build.evidence: Android: app-debug.apk 5.2MB verified. iOS simulator: xcodebuild success in 27s on iPhone 17 Pro (iOS 18.x). 3 screenshots avg_brightness=138.6 (pass). WebKit touch coordinate test: PASS.

gaps.description: No formal LevelGoal class or explicit goal_type dispatch. Only clear_all (isCleared) and partial obstacle_clear (ObstacleSystem.isObstacleGoalMet) are implemented. tile_target and score_target variants not present.
gaps.recommendation: Add a LevelGoal class or goalType field to level configs with dispatcher in GameplayScene._checkWin for 4 goal types

recommended_actions: Add LevelGoal class with tile_target/obstacle_clear/score_target/clear_all dispatch to complete the 4-type goal system
Update capacitor.config.json appId from com.glowisland.app to com.glowisland.canvas2d to match iOS build bundle
Consider adding haptic feedback for combo≥4 (Capacitor @capacitor/haptics already planned in node spec)
evidence_sources: Direct code inspection: ProgressManager.js, GameplayScene.js, SpecialTiles.js, ObstacleSystem.js, ShopScene.js, AudioManager.js, layouts.js
canvas2d-client/ios/build/canvas2d-sim-test-report.json: overall=pass, 3 screenshots avg_brightness=138.6, WebKit touch PASS, portrait lock PASS

bugs_fixed_by_ios_build.description: GameScene called new TileGrid() with no args; TileGrid requires levelData (reads levelData.gridRows). Caused TypeError crash on iOS WebView.
bugs_fixed_by_ios_build.fix: GameScene imports LEVELS from level-data.js and passes LEVELS["1-1"] as default levelData.

bugs_fixed_by_ios_build.description: Renderer.clear() used physical pixel dimensions (this.width/height) under dpr-scaled ctx transform, causing blank clear on iOS at dpr=3.
bugs_fixed_by_ios_build.fix: Changed to use logical dimensions (this.lw, this.lh).

bugs_fixed_by_ios_build.description: _layout() and draw methods used r.width/r.height (physical) under dpr-scaled ctx, drawing all content off-screen on iOS.
bugs_fixed_by_ios_build.fix: Layout and draw methods now use r.lw/r.lh (logical CSS pixels).
